data.title: Schroders Capital's fund of funds has raised more than $600 million and plans to invest in financial technology and Gen AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Schroders Capital announced that its fund Schroders Capital Private Equity Global Innovation XI Fund has completed fundraising of over US$600 million and plans to invest in areas such as financial technology and generative artificial intelligence Gen AI. Schroders Capital is an investor in crypto-friendly digital bank Revolut, and its business covers alternative asset classes, including infrastructure, secondary markets, securitized products, etc. (Techfundingnews)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 0.48% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 29, 2025, 12:42 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,689.350098 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.48% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Schroders Capital Fund Secures Over $600 Million for Fintech and AI Investments
data.description: According to Odaily, Schroders Capital has announced the successful fundraising of over $600 million for its Schroders Capital Private Equity Global Innovation XI Fund. The fund aims to invest in sectors such as financial technology and generative artificial intelligence. Schroders Capital is known for its investment in the crypto-friendly digital bank Revolut and operates across various alternative asset classes, including infrastructure, secondary markets, and securitized products.

data.title: Stablecoins Backed by U.S. Dollar Could Enhance American Influence, Says Vice President Vance
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Vice President Vance stated at the 'Bitcoin 2025' conference that stablecoins backed by the U.S. dollar have the potential to strengthen America's influence abroad. He described these digital currencies as a 'force multiplier' for extending U.S. influence globally.

data.title: The revised annualized quarterly rate of real GDP in the first quarter of the United States was -0.2%, expected to be -0.30%, and the previous value was -0.30%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The revised annualized quarterly rate of real GDP in the first quarter of the United States was -0.2%, expected to be -0.30%, and the previous value was -0.30%. (Jinshi)

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 was 240,000, while the expected number was 230,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 was 240,000, which was expected to be 230,000. The previous value was revised from 227,000 to 226,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Rise to 240,000, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 24 reached 240,000. This figure surpassed the anticipated 230,000 claims. The previous week's data was revised from 227,000 to 226,000.

data.title: U.S. GDP Revised to Show Slight Improvement in First Quarter
data.description: According to Odaily, the United States' first-quarter real GDP annualized growth rate has been revised to -0.2%. This figure is an improvement over the previous estimate of -0.30% and also surpasses the expected rate of -0.30%. This revision indicates a slightly better economic performance than initially anticipated.

data.title: White House Considers Various Tariff Options
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the White House National Economic Council Director, Hassett, has stated that the Trump administration is exploring multiple options regarding tariffs. U. S. President Donald Trump and his team are evaluating different strategies to address the ongoing tariff issues.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/24898373120338?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Opinion: US Vice President Vance sees stablecoins as a new pillar of US economic diplomacy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that U.S. Vice President Cyrus Vance previously stated in a speech at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference that once the GENIUS Act is implemented, it is expected to greatly expand the application of stablecoins as a digital payment system and provide convenience for millions of Americans. At the same time, this will also protect coin holders and enhance market transparency. CNBC reporter MacKenzie Sigalos said that Vance believes that dollar-backed stablecoins can enhance the strength of the United States overseas, calling it a "force multiplier" of U.S. influence. He sees stablecoins as a new pillar of U.S. economic diplomacy. (CNBC)

data.title: Bitcoin's Dominance May Delay Altcoin Season, Says Crypto Influencer
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, prominent crypto figure James Wynn expressed on the X platform that the anticipated altcoin season is unlikely to occur before Bitcoin reaches a new all-time high. Even if Bitcoin achieves this milestone, its current dominance suggests that the altcoin season could be significantly postponed.

Wynn noted that most aggressive investors allocate 80% of their portfolios to altcoins. However, he advised that 99% should be invested in Bitcoin, with the remaining 1% reserved for meme coins, which he claims outperform other investments. Wynn emphasized this as a factual observation.

data.title: Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council: Tariff ruling will not affect ongoing trade agreements
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council, said that the ruling on tariffs will not affect the ongoing trade agreements. The Trump administration has multiple options on the issue of tariffs and is confident that the appeal of the tariff ruling will be successful. More trade agreements are expected in the coming weeks. As of last week, three agreements were ready and waiting for Trump to make a decision. (Jinshi)

data.title: Judicial Ruling on Tariffs Expected to Be Overturned
data.description: According to PANews, a judicial ruling concerning tariffs is anticipated to be overturned. White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett stated that the Trump administration has various options regarding tariffs. He emphasized that the ruling will not impact ongoing trade agreements and expressed confidence in the success of the appeal against the tariff decision. Hassett also mentioned that more trade agreements are expected in the coming weeks, with three agreements ready for U.S. President Donald Trump’s decision as of last week.

data.title: White House Considers Various Tariff Options
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the White House National Economic Council Director, Hassett, has stated that the Trump administration is exploring multiple options regarding tariffs. U.S. President Donald Trump and his team are evaluating different strategies to address the ongoing tariff issues.

data.title: Analysis: SOL/ETH pair breaks below multi-month rising wedge pattern, signaling a 40% drop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market shows that as of May 29, the SOL/ETH trading pair has fallen below its rising wedge pattern that has lasted for several months. This bearish structure usually foreshadows a sharp decline. From a technical perspective, a breakout of a rising wedge typically results in a decline equal to the maximum height of the pattern. In addition, Meme coin activity on the Solana chain has cooled significantly. For example, the average daily revenue of the Meme coin launch platform Pump.fun has dropped sharply since early April and is close to the annual low. Standard Chartered Bank previously warned in a report that if Solana fails to expand its application ecosystem beyond Meme coins, it may perform poorly amid intensified competition in Ethereum Layer 2, while analyst Alex Clay predicts that the so-called "Ethereum strong period" has arrived, further supporting expectations of a SOL/ETH decline. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain Unveils Exclusive Incentive Program to Accelerate Real-World Asset (RWA) Adoption
data.description: BNB Chain has announced a new exclusive incentive program to support the growth of Real-World Asset (RWA) projects in the Web3 space. The initiative opens applications starting May 29, 2025, offering a suite of resources designed to help RWA builders scale, grow liquidity, and onboard new users.Program Overview: Fueling the RWA Movement on BNB ChainThe newly launched BNB Chain RWA Exclusive Incentive Program aims to support both new and existing RWA projects seeking to build or migrate to the BNB Chain ecosystem. It aligns with growing industry trends connecting traditional finance (TradFi) assets with decentralized infrastructure.Key support includes:Technical and Compliance GuidanceLiquidity Seeding and TVL IncentivesGrowth-Focused Funding and Marketing SupportCustomized Roadmaps for Scalability and AdoptionThe program is open to all RWA projects, regardless of sub-sector or development stage. While market cap and traction are considered for mature teams, BNB Chain also welcomes early-stage initiatives that demonstrate unique potential.How to Apply and Maximize Selection ChancesProjects interested in participating are encouraged to submit applications immediately. There is no set deadline, and the BNB Chain team will conduct ongoing evaluations.To enhance visibility and transparency, projects are recommended to integrate with DeFiLlama. This will offer the community a clearer picture of project fundamentals and on-chain performance.Selected projects will receive dedicated support from the BNB Chain team. Importantly, projects not selected initially will still remain eligible for future consideration.Why BNB Chain Is Ideal for RWA ProjectsBNB Chain offers an infrastructure optimized for RWA innovation:High Performance: Up to 2,000 TPS on BSC and 4,000+ TPS via Layer 2 opBNBLow Fees: Average transaction fee of just $0.01Massive Reach: Over 562 million unique addresses and 10 million daily active usersThriving Ecosystem: 5,000+ dApps across DeFi, stablecoins, NFTs, and moreWith a DeFi TVL exceeding $10.7 billion and stablecoin market caps surpassing $10 billion, the BNB Chain ecosystem provides unmatched exposure and scalability for RWA developers.Building the Bridge Between Crypto and the Real WorldBNB Chain’s new RWA track marks a bold step in bringing tokenized real-world assets into mainstream adoption. The team believes RWA projects will play a crucial role in bridging traditional and decentralized finance, ultimately bringing the next billion users into Web3.

data.title: Fosun Wealth and Vaulta collaborate to support Hong Kong blockchain infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vaulta and Fosun Wealth Holdings have partnered to support the blockchain infrastructure of Hong Kong's financial industry. Vaulta will provide its BankingOS suite and exSat digital banking platform for asset issuance, revenue generation and crypto payments, while Fosun Wealth will provide financial licenses and physical asset issuance capabilities. (CoinDesk)

data.title: China Oil Capital Maintains Distance from Stablecoin Ventures
data.description: According to PANews, China Oil Capital has announced on its interactive platform that it is currently not involved in any stablecoin-related business activities. The company emphasized its commitment to monitoring and researching policy developments in this area. It intends to conduct its operations lawfully, prudently, and steadily.

data.title: Polymarket Bets Big: Altcoin ETFs Poised for 70%+ Approval in 2025
data.description:
TL;DR Strong Forecast for Altcoin ETFs: Polymarket predicts more than a 70% approval chance for several altcoin ETFs in 2025, with XRP leading at an 83% probability. Enhanced Market Accessibility: Approval of these ETFs would provide investors with regulated, 24/7 access to popular crypto assets, bridging traditional finance and DeFi.
